title: Regime-Gated Momentum / Mean-Reversion Signal Router
summary: Two-state VIX-based router that shifts signal composite weights toward momentum or mean-reversion dimensions based on current market regime. Layered as a multiplier (A/B testable via config flag) — does not replace the equal-weight baseline.
motivation: Research consensus (2024-2026): momentum dominates in low-volatility bull regimes; mean-reversion dominates in high-volatility choppy regimes. A static equal-weight model ignores this. The router makes the signal model context-aware without requiring hmmlearn or complex ML.

regime_detection.fallback: On fetch failure → 'momentum' (safe default: prefers action over inaction)

design.layering: Multipliers applied to each dimension's score after computing, before adding to total. Score is still capped at 50. dim_directions weights also multiplied — regime naturally influences direction vote too.
design.vix_dedup: bot.py reuses VIX already fetched by scanner.get_market_regime(). No second fetch on scan cycle. score_universe() accepts regime_router=str to skip its own fetch when called from bot.py.

files_changed: config.py          — 4 new keys: regime_routing_enabled, regime_router_vix_threshold, regime_router_momentum_mult, regime_router_reversion_mult
signals.py         — get_market_regime_vix(), _regime_multipliers(), multipliers in compute_confluence(), regime_router threaded through _fetch_one_process/fetch_multi_timeframe/score_universe
bot.py             — compute router from cached VIX, log it, pass to score_universe
dashboard.py       — regime meta line shows ROUTER: MOMENTUM or ROUTER: MEAN-REVERSION
tests/test_regime_router.py — 19 unit tests (6 VIX detection, 8 multiplier, 5 confluence)

config_keys.regime_routing_enabled: bool  — A/B flag: False = equal-weight baseline (default: True)
config_keys.regime_router_vix_threshold: int   — VIX level separating momentum from mean_reversion (default: 20)
config_keys.regime_router_momentum_mult: float — multiplier for momentum dims in momentum regime (default: 1.3)
config_keys.regime_router_reversion_mult: float — multiplier for reversion dim in momentum regime (default: 0.7)

definition_of_done: ✅ Multipliers applied in compute_confluence() — momentum dims +30% in momentum regime, reversion +30% in mean_reversion regime
✅ Config flag regime_routing_enabled enables A/B testing
✅ Regime state logged each scan cycle
✅ Dashboard shows ROUTER state in regime meta line
✅ 19 unit tests pass, 0 regressions in existing suite
